# Urgent Monthly Report

Summarize the monthly sales data and send it to the management team by end of day.

Requirements:
- Include total revenue numbers
- Compare with last month
- Highlight top performing products
- Add recommendations for next month
- Keep it under 2 pages

metadata.required_action: share the details regarding pricing, timeline, and requirements

raw_content:
# Email Reply Request

## Sender
abdulbasitghori555@gmail.com

## Subject
Request for Project Information

## Message
Hello,

I hope you are doing well.

I would like to get more information about your services and the process of starting a new project with your team. Please share the details regarding pricing, timeline, and requirements.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards  
Abdul Basit

## Task
Write a professional email reply thanking the sender for their interest and informing them that our team will review the request and respond shortly with the required details.

metadata.description: Write a professional LinkedIn post announcing that our company has launched a new AI-powered employee automation system.
metadata.required_action: Write a professional LinkedIn post announcing that our company has launched a new AI-powered employee automation system.

raw_content:
# LinkedIn Post Draft

Task:
Write a professional LinkedIn post announcing that our company has launched a new AI-powered employee automation system.

Details:
- The system helps automate repetitive office tasks.
- It improves productivity and saves time.
- It is designed for small and medium businesses.
- Keep the tone professional and engaging.
- The post should be 6–8 lines long.

Output format:
Provide only the LinkedIn post text.
